iphone_15_pro_max.tagline: Titanium. So strong. So light. So Pro.
iphone_15_pro_max.description: iPhone 15 Pro Max features a strong and light titanium design with the A17 Pro chip, a customizable Action button, and the most powerful iPhone camera system ever.

iphone_15_pro.tagline: Titanium. So strong. So light. So Pro.
iphone_15_pro.description: iPhone 15 Pro features a titanium design, the A17 Pro chip, a customizable Action button, and a powerful pro camera system in a more compact size.

iphone_15.description: iPhone 15 brings the Dynamic Island, a 48MP camera, and USB-C connectivity to the standard iPhone lineup with a gorgeous color-infused glass design.

iphone_15_plus.description: iPhone 15 Plus offers everything in iPhone 15, but with a larger 6.7-inch screen and the longest battery life ever in an iPhone.

iphone_14.description: iPhone 14 features a 6.1-inch display, A15 Bionic chip, advanced dual-camera system, Crash Detection, and Emergency SOS via satellite.

iphone_14_plus.description: iPhone 14 Plus gives you a larger 6.7-inch display, all-day battery life, and advanced dual cameras powered by the A15 Bionic chip.

mbp_16_m3_max.description: The 16-inch MacBook Pro with M3 Max chip delivers extraordinary performance for the most demanding pro workflows, with up to 128GB unified memory.

mbp_14_m3_pro.description: The 14-inch MacBook Pro with M3 Pro chip delivers exceptional performance and battery life in a portable pro notebook.

mba_15_m3.description: MacBook Air 15-inch with M3 delivers incredible performance in a strikingly thin design, with a spacious Liquid Retina display.

mba_13_m3.description: MacBook Air 13-inch with M3 is the world's best consumer laptop, offering supercharged performance with the M3 chip in an impossibly thin design.

mba_13_m2.description: MacBook Air 13-inch with M2 combines strong everyday performance, silent fanless design, and all-day battery life in an ultrathin aluminum enclosure.

airpods_pro_2.description: AirPods Pro 2 feature the H2 chip, Adaptive Audio, Personalized Spatial Audio, and up to 2x more Active Noise Cancellation than the previous generation.

airpods_max.tagline: A perfect balance of high-fidelity audio.
airpods_max.description: AirPods Max combine a custom acoustic design with the Apple H1 chip for a breakthrough listening experience with Active Noise Cancellation and Spatial Audio.

watch_ultra_2.description: Apple Watch Ultra 2 is the most capable Apple Watch ever, built for endurance, exploration, and adventure with the brightest Apple display.

watch_series_9.description: Apple Watch Series 9 features the S9 chip, a brighter display, and the new Double Tap gesture, making it the most powerful Apple Watch yet.

magsafe_charger.description: The MagSafe Charger provides an efficient wireless charging experience with perfectly aligned magnets that snap to your iPhone.

magic_keyboard.description: Magic Keyboard with Touch ID delivers a remarkably comfortable typing experience with a built-in fingerprint sensor for secure authentication.

airtag_4_pack.description: AirTag 4 Pack helps you keep tabs on keys, bags, and more with Precision Finding, Lost Mode, and seamless Find My integration.
